chapter_title.ar: باب صِفَةِ الذَّبْحِ وَ النَّحْرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – Characteristics of the slaughter and the sacrifice

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/10)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/10)
text: قَالَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا ذُبِحَتِ الشَّاةُ وَ سُلِخَتْ أَوْ سُلِخَ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنْهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ تَمُوتَ لَمْ يَحِلَّ أَكْلُهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, raising it, said,
‘Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When you slaughter the sheep, and strip it, or strip off something from it before it dies, it is not Permissible to eat it’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from in a marfu‘ manner the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When you slaughter a sheep and remove its skin or a certain part of its skin before it dies, it then is not lawful to use it for food.’”
